calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemtion
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert F. Cohen, Esq. of the Law Offices of Robert F. Cohen, T:800.492.2657, specially appearing for plaintiff;
Myanka Lewis-Mims, T:415.559.7662, defendant/claimant appearing on her own behalf.

RULING: The matter was discussed and the Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Off calendar. The Judgment Creditor failed to file an opposition and notice of hearing by the filing deadline and the Sheriff granted the Judgment Debtor's claim of exemption. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.
